name: Research Archive
description: All research briefs, competitive intel, market sweeps, and expert dives. Each brief is tagged with a decay rate — evergreen (lasts until superseded), fast-moving (re-verify after 2 weeks), time-sensitive (expires on a specific date). Semantic search works across every brief ever written.

fields.name: topic
fields.description: Short topic slug: competitive-intel, market-research, tech-stack, claude-code-daily, etc.

fields.name: decay
fields.description: Evergreen: valid until superseded. Fast-moving: re-verify after 2 weeks. Time-sensitive: expires on a date.

fields.name: expires_at
fields.description: Required if decay=time-sensitive. After this date the brief is stale.

fields.name: action_classification
fields.description: ACTIONABLE needs immediate action. OPPORTUNITY worth exploring. AWARENESS context only.

fields.name: owner
fields.description: Officer who should act on findings (if actionable)

fields.name: notion_page_id
fields.description: Original Notion page ID if migrated
